|desc={{p|Bellibolt}} is Iono's only known Pokémon. It is often seen by her side when she is calling [[Dot]], and participates in all of Iono's livestreams, being just as popular as its {{pkmn|Trainer}}.

In ''[[HZ050|Trending Terastallization! Dance, Dance, Quaxly!]]'', Bellibolt was used to battle [[Dot's Quaxly]] for her [[Tera Training]] test, and won.

In ''[[HZ055|Showdown! The Paldea Elite Four]]'', it teamed up with Quaxly to battle [[Poppy]] during the [[Elite Four Tag Battle]]. Bellibolt was able to knock out {{p|Copperajah}}, making the pair the only team to defeat an [[Elite Four]] member.

In ''[[HZ128|Dot and Quaxwell Step it Up!]]'', Bellibolt battled against [[Dot]]'s {{p|Quaxwell}} in hopes of restoring Dot's battling spirit. After slowing down Quaxwell's {{stat|speed}} with {{m|Mud Shot}}, Bellibolt gained the lead up until Quaxwell [[Evolution|evolved]] into {{p|Quaquaval}}. After its {{m|Sucker Punch}} missed, Bellibolt was knocked out by Quaquaval's {{m|Wave Crash}}, giving Dot the victory.

Bellibolt's known moves are {{m|Spark}}, {{m|Discharge}}, {{m|Slack Off}}, {{m|Reflect}}, {{m|Zap Cannon}}, {{m|Thunder}}, {{m|Mud Shot}}, and {{m|Sucker Punch}}, and its Ability is {{a|Electromorphosis}}.}}
